title: Upon Pievish. Epig.
content:
Pievish doth boast that he's the very first
    Of English poets, and 'tis thought the worst.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon Pievish. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
